heading: Rights and powers of debtor
label: 1203 Rights and powers of debtor
text: Subject to such limitations as the court may prescribe, a debtor in possession shall have all the rights, other than the right to compensation under section 330, and powers, and shall perform all the functions and duties, except the duties specified in paragraphs (3) and (4) of section 1106(a), of a trustee serving in a case under chapter 11, including operating the debtor’s farm or commercial fishing operation.
notes: CodificationFor repeal of section effective , and subsequent reenactment of section, see note set out preceding .Oct. 1, 1998section 1201 of this title
